vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: During my formative years, I was obsessed with assembling intricate scale models of vintage cars.

vocab.meaning: giải tỏa tâm trí/thu hút sự chú ý
vocab.example: Painting was a wonderful way to divert my attention from the pressures of school exams when I was ten.

vocab.meaning: một hoạt động/thú vui đơn độc
vocab.example: For me, reading was a solitary pursuit that allowed me to explore far-off worlds from my bedroom.
Driven by an innate curiosity, I used to spend hours taking apart old gadgets to see how they functioned.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng cảm giác về (thứ gì đó)
vocab.example: Collecting rare coins fostered a sense of discipline and historical appreciation in me as a young boy.

vocab.meaning: có năng khiếu/biểu hiện tài lẻ về
vocab.example: My teachers noticed that I exhibited a knack for sketching architectural structures even at age seven.

vocab.meaning: tạo ra một lối thoát/cách giải tỏa cho
vocab.example: Playing the piano provided an outlet for my emotions during the turbulent years of early adolescence.

vocab.meaning: đắm mình vào thứ gì đó
vocab.example: I would often immerse myself in the world of classical mythology, reading every book the local library had to offer.

vocab.meaning: khơi dậy một niềm đam mê
vocab.example: My grandfather’s storytelling sessions engendered a passion for creative writing that has never left me.

vocab.meaning: giết thời gian (một cách nhẹ nhàng)
vocab.example: In the pre-internet era, we used to pass the time by organizing elaborate scavenger hunts in the neighborhood.
